findings.evidence: Grep shows both totally-real lemmas exist in `TauCeti/Geometry/Symplectic/TotallyReal.lean:44` and `:52`, while this docstring names only the top-bot versions at lines 24-25.
findings.fix: Either cite both `TauCeti.Submodule.isMaximalTotallyReal_prod_top_bot_product`/`prod_bot_top_product` and both Lagrangian lemmas, or rewrite the sentence to refer only to the first factor.
findings.issue: The module doc says the coordinate factors are simultaneously maximal totally real and Lagrangian but cites only `TauCeti.Submodule.isMaximalTotallyReal_prod_top_bot_product` and only `isLagrangian_prod_top_bot`, which documents just the first factor while the sentence says both factors.

summary: The new file has a substantive module docstring and most exported declarations are documented, but one module-level cross-reference overclaims the coordinate-factor comparison it cites.
